NAME: Dynamic ABAP Code Event
DESCRIPTION: ABAP code was dynamically created, executed, modified or deleted in the system. Source: Security Audit Log. Event: BU4

NAME: ABAP Debugging
DESCRIPTION: A manually caught process was stopped from within the Debugger. Source: Security Audit Log. Event: CUN CUO CUP

NAME: Users with critical profiles
DESCRIPTION: Users with critical profiles have been detected

NAME: Errors in CCDB stores
DESCRIPTION: Errors have been detected for some of the CCDB stores of the technical system

NAME: Expiring ABAP Certificates
DESCRIPTION: Some ABAP certificates have expired or will expire soon

NAME: Failed ABAP transports
DESCRIPTION: Failed ABAP transports have been detected

NAME: Global changes allowed
DESCRIPTION: The system change option is set to Modifiable. For productive systems SAP recommends to set this parameter to Not Modifiable

NAME: ABAP system not available
DESCRIPTION: The ABAP system did not respond to availability checks

NAME: Active Vulnerable ICF Services
DESCRIPTION: ICF services with known security vulnerabilities are activated in the system.  Active services should be deactivated using transaction SICF

NAME: New Admin User Created
DESCRIPTION: A user was assigned to the ADMIN or SUPER user group. Source: Security Audit Log. Event: /L7S/ADMIN_CREATED

NAME: RFC Call for ANST_CHANGE_PARAMETER
DESCRIPTION: There was a successful RFC call for the function module ANST_CHANGE_PARAMETER. The RFM is often called by attackers to access maintain system settings. Source: Security Audit Log. Event: AUK

NAME: Application Server Stopped
DESCRIPTION: The application server was stopped. This will interrupt the availability of the SAP system. Review the system log to determine the root cause of the stoppage. Source: Security Audit Log. Event: AUH

NAME: RFC Call for ARFC_EXECUTE
DESCRIPTION: There was a successful RFC call for the function module ARFC_EXECUTE. The RFM is often called by attackers to execute malicious commands or programs. Source: Security Audit Log. Event: AUK

NAME: Audit Configuration Changed
DESCRIPTION: The configuration of the Security Audit Log was modified. Run transaction SM19 to display the username responsible for the last change to the audit profile. Source: Security Audit Log. Event: AUE

NAME: Audit Data Deleted
DESCRIPTION: Audit log data was deleted. Source: Security Audit Log. Event: EU5

NAME: Audit Filter Changed
DESCRIPTION: An audit filter was modified in the Security Audit Log. Event ID AUF includes details of the relevant audit slot and changes including the client and user settings for the filter. To view full details of the classes and event IDs that were impacted by the change, navigate to the Detail View for the event in the Security Audit Log using transaction SM20

NAME: Audit Status
DESCRIPTION: The status of the Security Audit Log was modified. Review the event text to determine if logging was activated (1) or deactivated (0). Source: Security Audit Log. Event: AUJ FU0

NAME: RFC Call for BAPI_USER_CREATE
DESCRIPTION: There was a successful RFC call for the function module BAPI_USER_CREATE. The RFM is often called by attackers to perform user administration. Source: Security Audit Log. Event: AUK

NAME: RFC Call for BAPI_USER_CREATE1
DESCRIPTION: There was a successful RFC call for the function module BAPI_USER_CREATE1. The RFM is often called by attackers to perform user administration. Source: Security Audit Log. Event: AUK

NAME: RFC Call for BAPI_USER_DELETE
DESCRIPTION: There was a successful RFC call for the function module BAPI_USER_DELETE. The RFM is often called by attackers to perform user administration. Source: Security Audit Log. Event: AUK

NAME: Unauthorized RFC Destination Created
DESCRIPTION: An RFC destination was created without approval. This can allow outbound connections or command execution paths. Source: Security Audit Log

NAME: User Assigned SAP_ALL
DESCRIPTION: High-risk authorization profile SAP_ALL was assigned to a user. Immediate review required. Source: Security Audit Log

NAME: Password Policy Weakened
DESCRIPTION: Password complexity or length policy was reduced. Increases brute-force risk. Source: Security Audit Log

NAME: Security Audit Log Disabled
DESCRIPTION: Security Audit Log was deactivated. This reduces detection capability and may indicate tampering. Source: Security Audit Log

NAME: Critical Authorization Object Changed
DESCRIPTION: Authorization objects were modified affecting access control. Source: Security Audit Log

NAME: Multiple Failed Logons Detected
DESCRIPTION: Multiple consecutive logon failures observed for one or more users. Source: Security Audit Log

NAME: Background Job Modified
DESCRIPTION: Critical background job definition was modified. May impact system integrity. Source: Security Audit Log

NAME: Transport Imported into Production
DESCRIPTION: Transport request imported into production system. Validate change approval. Source: Security Audit Log

NAME: Table Logging Disabled
DESCRIPTION: Table logging/auditing setting was disabled. Source: Security Audit Log

NAME: New Dialog User Created
DESCRIPTION: A new dialog user was created. Validate request and assigned roles. Source: Security Audit Log

NAME: External RFC Gateway Access Enabled
DESCRIPTION: External access to RFC gateway was enabled or expanded. Source: Security Audit Log

NAME: Client Copy Attempt Detected
DESCRIPTION: A client copy attempt was initiated. Validate the initiator and scope. Source: Security Audit Log

NAME: Unauthorized User Lock/Unlock
DESCRIPTION: A privileged user account was locked/unlocked without approval. Source: Security Audit Log

NAME: SNC Configuration Changed
DESCRIPTION: SNC settings changed (encryption/authentication). Validate secure communication posture. Source: Security Audit Log

NAME: System Parameter Reset
DESCRIPTION: System parameters were reset/changed. Review affected security parameters. Source: Security Audit Log
